== Notes for [[Item:Q117178|Q117178]] ==

"LDS Ancestral File", Church of Jesus Christ of the Latter DaySaints.[Custer February 1, 2002 Family Tree.FTW]

[merge G675.FTW]

"LDS Ancestral File", Church of Jesus Christ of the Latter Day Saints.




[spelman.FTW]
REFN: 16586

1 NAME (Don) Pedro Gomez De /BARROSO/


[spelman.FTW]
REFN: 16586


[spelman.FTW]
REFN: 16586


[spelman.FTW]
REFN: 16586


[spelman.FTW]
REFN: 16586

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
